required_contains.text: Price protection also carries a documented default. In btcli it is enabled by default with a
tolerance of 0.5%, while the documentation notes the SDK does not enable it by default and must be
configured explicitly. So even when a pending order is visible in the mempool, a btcli caller
already has a 0.5% ceiling limiting how far that exposure can move their own execution, whereas an
SDK caller who skips the setting relies on no default bound
